title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE STA. CATALINA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LUBAO, PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA, TO GRACIANO PAULE ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 2415 / 59 OG No. 42, 7232 (October 21, 1963)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3687, June 22, 1963 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE STA. CATALINA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LUBAO, PROVINCE OF PAMPANGA, TO GRACIANO PAULE ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION .1. The name of the Sta. Catalina Elementary School in the Municipality of Lubao, Province of Pampanga, is changed to Graciano Paule Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1963
